name: Base64 encoder & decoder
desc: Encode or decode Base64 for tokens, snippets, and small payloads. Strings stay in your browser tab unless you copy them elsewhere.

name: Base64 encoding explained — what it is and when to use it
desc: Base64 explained in plain English: how the encoding works, why it exists, common use cases like API tokens and data URIs, and why it is NOT encryption.

name: CSV to JSON Converter
desc: Instantly convert CSV data to a valid JSON array in your browser. Paste your spreadsheet, configure options, copy the result. No uploads, no account required.

name: Case converter
desc: Switch naming styles for code, headings, or data cleanup without sending strings to a backend—paste, convert, copy.
tags: case uppercase lowercase title camelCase text

name: Color palette generator
desc: Spin up five-color palettes and copy HEX codes with one click. Useful for UI spikes; all randomness runs in the browser.

name: Find & replace text
desc: Replace phrases across long pasted text with optional case sensitivity. Runs entirely in JavaScript—good for logs, lists, and CMS exports.

name: How to compress images for web without losing quality
desc: A practical guide to reducing image file size for faster web pages. Learn which formats work best, what quality settings to use, and how to compress images safely in your browser.

name: How to decode JWT safely (without trusting payload)
desc: What a browser decoder can and cannot do, which claims to eyeball first, and why signature checks still belong on your server.
tags: jwt guide tutorial token verify claims security auth

name: How to generate strong passwords — and store them safely
desc: What makes a password strong, how long it should be, which characters to include, and how to store it safely without memorising random strings. A practical security guide.

name: Image compressor
desc: JPEG and WebP output with a quality slider using canvas APIs. Your images are not uploaded to ToolBite for processing.
tags: image compress jpg png webp photo

name: JSON formatter & validator
desc: Beautify, minify, and spot syntax errors before you ship payloads or JSON-LD. Parsing and formatting stay in your tab—not on our servers.

name: JSON formatter guide: fix invalid JSON fast
desc: A straight checklist for trailing commas, quotes, and common parse errors—meant for API payloads and config you paste into ToolBite’s formatter.
tags: json guide tutorial fix invalid json trailing comma quotes

name: JWT decoder
desc: Decode JWT header and payload JSON for debugging. This is decode-only: signature verification still belongs in your trusted backend.
tags: jwt json web token decode bearer auth developer

name: Lorem ipsum generator
desc: Classic filler paragraphs for layouts and CMS previews. Generated text never leaves your browser session.

name: Password generator
desc: Generate long random passwords with the Web Crypto API where available. Nothing is sent to ToolBite; copy and store secrets in your own vault.

name: QR Code Generator
desc: Generate QR codes instantly for any URL, text, email or phone number. Download as PNG. No uploads, no account required — everything runs in your browser.

name: QR codes explained — how to create, customize, and use them
desc: Everything you need to know about QR codes: what they store, how error correction works, best practices for print vs digital use, and how to generate a QR code for free in your browser.

name: Reading time calculator
desc: Paste an article or doc to approximate reading time from word count. Handy before publishing; runs fully client-side.
tags: read time wpm minutes blog seo

name: Remove duplicate lines
desc: Keep first occurrences of repeated lines in pasted logs, keywords, or inventories. No server round-trip for the dedupe logic.
tags: duplicate dedupe unique lines list text

name: Remove extra spaces
desc: Collapse runs of spaces, trim lines, or strip blank lines from messy copy. All transformations happen client-side for privacy.

name: SEO slug best practices (with examples)
desc: Length, separators, keywords, and mistakes that waste crawl budget—paired with ToolBite’s text-to-slug helper for quick clean URLs.
tags: seo slug guide url best practices permalink keywords hyphens

desc: Compute digests for strings using Web Crypto where available. Inputs are not uploaded; hashes are for local verification workflows.

name: Text to slug generator
desc: Turn headlines into lowercase, hyphenated slugs for blogs and product URLs. Processing stays on your device.

name: URL encoder & decoder
desc: Encode or decode URI components and full URLs for debugging and hand-built links. All work happens locally after load.

name: URL encoding explained — what %20 means and how to fix broken links
desc: What is URL encoding? Why does a space become %20? This guide explains percent-encoding, which characters need encoding, encodeURI vs encodeURIComponent, and how to fix broken URLs.

name: UUID / GUID generator
desc: Generate random v4 UUIDs for databases, fixtures, and API tests. IDs are created in-browser; nothing is logged by ToolBite.

name: UUID and GUID explained — what they are and when to generate one
desc: What is a UUID? What is a GUID? Are they the same? This guide explains UUID versions, when to use them in databases and APIs, and how to generate them safely in your browser.

name: Word counter
desc: Words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs for drafts and specs. Everything runs locally after the page loads—paste long documents freely.
